transcript: Now, back to the Troubleshooter, Tom Martino!

11:36. Dr. Laura at 12:05, news at the top of the hour, Dave Minshall in for Tom. Thank you. [indistinct] Thank you, wakes me up. Uh, here... here is a call I can't resist, uh, on the hotline. Grover Knox will do a Dave Minshall impression, and I'm told we have screened this call, and we know it is clean. Hiya Grover, how are you doing?
Hi, I'm fine, how are you?
What's goin' on? Actually, I do a better Tom Martino one, which I can do too, if you want, but...
Well, do Tom first. Uh... uh...
Well, yeah, do Tom... Alright, we'll... we'll...
We'll... we'll have... we'll have a jury here.
[laughs] You got the "suck" part of it.
Um... okay, and, um... you... the rest of your listeners will have to visualize the, um... the patented, um, head nod for the Dave Minshall impression.
[laughs] Not bad. You know, you're right about the head bob, though. I could never, I don't... I could... I could never cure myself of the head bob at the end of a story.
Scott Cortelyou helped me out with this.
Do I... do I... I know you, don't I?
'[looped]' Grover. Grover. Grover. Grover. Grover. Grover. Grover. Grover.

My concern was Grover. That was my concern. But if Grover is a part of other people's little schemes, Grover goes along... goes along with little schemes, then, that's what hurts more than anything... is because when I met Grover, I met a decent person, that's the way I look at it. I can't look at it any other way.
'[looped, gradually deteriorating]' Grover. Grover. Grover. Grover. Grover. Grover. Grover. Grover.

But I'm just saying to you, you know, Grover, you know, you're young. And, uh... you know, I, I'm real puzzled about this whole situation, you know, because I was... here I was building you up and everything, and then, uh... y'know, I'm kind of stunned. You know?
So... what is goin' on? But my biggest concern now is... is the rumors that I've been hearing. And if I don't like what I heard, you know, then you'd be more of a hinder to us...
...more than a help to us. And people ask, and then they start challenging it, and then Channel 9 News is involved, and, uh... 4 News is involved, you know, and 7 News is involved...
And I hate to see you get in any... any kind of a situation like that... you're never going to please anybody, you know?
So I have to believe that as of right now, you don't know.
I don't know, I don't even... I'm not even sure what we're talking about at this point.

Well, I know what I'm sure... I'm, I'm... I know what I'm sure of, what I'm talking about, that's why I'm not talking to you about it, because I already know what I'm talking about. That's what I'm saying. I really feel like... an idiot.
